label: CIS Safeguard 17.4
title: Establish and Maintain an Incident Response Process

prose.en: Establish and maintain a documented incident response process that addresses roles and responsibilities, compliance requirements, and a communication plan. Review annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
A documented incident response process is established and maintained.
The process addresses roles and responsibilities, compliance requirements, and a communication plan.
The process is reviewed annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
